articles.description: Spurs hit the self-destruct button once more to leave Roberto De Zerbi frustrated as fight to avoid relegation looks set to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Tottenham 1-1 Leeds: Roberto De Zerbi frustrated as Spurs hit self-destruct button

articles.description: Two months after many thought Antonin Kinsky would never play for Tottenham again the goalkeeper makes one of the saves of the season to earn Spurs a point in their fight for Premier League survival.
articles.title: Tottenham: Goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky earns redemption with huge save against Leeds United

articles.description: The family of former WSL manager Matt Beard tell BBC Sport about the emotional burden of football management, and the changes they want to see.
articles.title: Matt Beard: Family calls for mandatory manager mental health checks after death

articles.description: The Premier League season has been defined by set-piece drama. It came to a head at West Ham on Sunday, when the VAR could have penalised any one of a handful of potential fouls.
articles.title: Premier League corners: Five fouls in one move - breaking down corner chaos

articles.description: Who will make the cut when England name their first Test squad of the summer?
articles.title: England Test squad: Who will face New Zealand?

articles.description: Matt Fitzpatrick's recent form puts him among the favourites to end a 107-year wait for an English winner at this week's US PGA Championship in Pennsylvania.
articles.title: US PGA Championship: Matt Fitzpatrick and the stats supporting his major tilt at Aronimink

articles.description: Marcus Rashford has an uncertain future despite the on-loan Manchester United forward scoring a brilliant free-kick for Barcelona in El Clasico.
articles.title: Marcus Rashford's Barcelona future remains uncertain

articles.description: Hull City winger Mohamed Belloumi made up for his lack of preparedness to win the Championship play-off semi-final against Millwall for his side.
articles.title: Mohamed Belloumi: Hull City winger makes up for slow introduction with match-winning impact

articles.description: Liverpool release images of a planned memorial to late forward Diogo Jota and his brother Andre Silva, following their deaths last summer.
articles.title: Diogo Jota: Liverpool release images of memorial to late forward

articles.description: Coco Gauff avoids an Italian Open upset - and a serious blow to her French Open preparations - by fighting back from a set down again in Rome.
articles.title: Italian Open 2026: Coco Gauff shows spirit to beat Iva Jovic in Rome
